summary: Iteration 7 - Complete frontend testing of expanded Investigation Documents module (65+ templates in 10 categories) and auto-linking with Case File Manager. All features working correctly.
passed_tests: Investigation Documents: All 10 category tabs visible and clickable (Complaint Stage 7, FIR Stage 5, Investigation 6, Witness Examination 5, Evidence Collection 9, Forensic Requests 5, Investigation Letters 8, Accused Handling 8, Court Documents 6, Administrative 6)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Complaint Stage (Petition Report, CSR Entry, etc.)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from FIR Stage (FIR Draft)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Evidence Collection (Seizure Panchanama)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Accused Handling (Arrest Memo)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Forensic Requests (FSL Request Letter)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Court Documents (Charge Sheet Draft)
Investigation Documents: Template selection from Investigation Letters (CDR Request)
Investigation Documents: Found 6/6 Administrative templates verified
Investigation Documents: Found 8/8 Investigation Letters templates verified
Investigation Documents: Form filling works (Police Station, Case ID, FIR Number, Complainant, Accused, Date, Time, Location, Officer, Rank, Sections, Description)
Investigation Documents: Document generation produces correct formatted preview
Investigation Documents: Action buttons visible - Copy, PDF, Word, Print, Save
Investigation Documents: Save to Case File button saves document with Case ID
Case File Manager: Page loads correctly with Case Files list panel and Details panel
Case File Manager: New case creation form works (Case ID, Complainant, Accused, Offence Type, Sections, Description)
Case File Manager: Case created toast message displayed
Case File Manager: Linked Documents section shows documents saved from Investigation Documents with matching Case ID (1 document linked)
Case File Manager: Linked Evidence section available (shows 0 items when none linked)
Case File Manager: Status dropdown with options (Under Investigation, Charge Sheet Filed, Trial Ongoing, Closed, Final Report)
Case File Manager: Export PDF button available
Evidence Manager: Case ID input field available for linking
Evidence Manager: File dropzone for Images, Video, Audio, PDF, Documents
Evidence Manager: SHA-256 hash generation info displayed
Evidence Manager: Evidence Library with search and filter options
critical_code_review_comments: Investigation Documents uses client-side PDF generation with jsPDF and Word generation with docx library - no backend API calls
Auto-linking uses localStorage with key pattern 'case_documents_{caseId}' - works correctly
Evidence Manager and Case File Manager use localStorage for data persistence (no backend APIs)
All 65+ templates are properly organized in 10 categories with correct template counts
seed_data_creation: Created test case AUTO/LINK/98788 with CSR Entry document linked
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investigation Documents now has 65+ templates in 10 categories: Complaint Stage (7), FIR Stage (5), Investigation (6), Witness Examination (5), Evidence Collection (9), Forensic Requests (5), Investigation Letters (8), Accused Handling (8), Court Documents (6), Administrative (6). Auto-linking between Investigation Documents and Case File Manager works via localStorage key 'case_documents_{caseId}'. Documents saved from Investigation Documents with a Case ID automatically appear in Case File Manager's Linked Documents section when viewing a case with the same Case ID.

mocked_apis.note: All Investigation Documents, Case File Manager, and Evidence Manager functionality is client-side using localStorage for data persistence. No backend APIs are used for these modules.
